claim: Triton is a language and compiler centered on the tile (statically shaped multi-dimensional sub-array), using a C-based language and an LLVM-based IR plus tile-level optimization passes to build portable GPU kernels on par with hand-tuned cuBLAS/cuDNN

claim: Modern Triton uses an MLIR-based backend that lowers Triton IR (TTIR) to TritonGPU IR (TTGIR) then LLVM IR then PTX/AMDGCN; kernels are autotuned via @triton.autotune over triton.Config with num_warps (warps per CTA) and num_stages (software-pipelining depth)
